author: @Pieskillet

text:
retropirate1 
And it was filled with YTP, and AVGN.

--Mini rant ahead. Don't bother if you don't give a shit---
In fact, I think YTP got the new  Mid- 2011+'s meme disease. YTP started out as editing poorly made crap (Such as Zelda CDI) and or funny and cringe inducing videos (Billy Mays) or at rare times, something purposely funny (HomestarRunner) into something for everyone to get their kicks to. Nowadays the resources people use in Youtube Poops don't even fit in the YTP community. At least they're more quality and more colorful now thanks to the majority of the community moving to Sony Vegas.
